question: Does the paper report HIV sequences from patient samples?
explain: The paper mentions that genotyping was performed on plasma samples from participants, indicating that HIV sequences were obtained from patient samples.
sentences: "Plasma samples were stored for genotyping."; "Genotyping was successful for 261 of 270 (97%) participants in the subcohort group (51 failed ART) and for 205 of 218 (94%) additional participants in the case group (all failed ART)."

question: Does the paper report in vitro drug susceptibility data?
explain: The paper focuses on genotyping and the association of baseline resistance with virologic failure, but it does not mention any in vitro drug susceptibility testing.
sentences: "Evaluation of pretreatment HIV genotyping is needed globally to guide treatment programs."; "We examined the association of pretreatment (baseline) drug resistance and subtype with virologic failure in a multinational, randomized clinical trial that evaluated 3 antiretroviral treatment (ART) regimens and included resource-limited setting sites."

question: What were the GenBank accession numbers for sequenced HIV isolates?
explain: The paper does not provide any GenBank accession numbers for the sequenced HIV isolates.

question: Which HIV species were studied in the paper?
explain: The paper specifically mentions HIV-1 in the context of drug resistance and virologic failure.
sentences: "Pretreatment HIV Drug Resistance and HIV-1 Subtype C Are Independently Associated With Virologic Failure: Results From the Multinational PEARLS (ACTG A5175) Clinical Trial"; "We examined the association of pretreatment (baseline) drug resistance and subtype with virologic failure in a multinational, randomized clinical trial that evaluated 3 antiretroviral treatment (ART) regimens and included resource-limited setting sites."

question: Which HIV genes were reported to have been sequenced?
explain: The paper mentions that *Pol* genotyping was performed, indicating that the pol gene was sequenced.
sentences: "Pol genotyping was performed in a nested case-cohort study including 270 randomly sampled participants (subcohort), and 218 additional participants failing ART (case group)."; "Pol genotyping was performed retrospectively at 4 regional laboratories that participated in the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID) Division of AIDS Virology Quality Assurance program using the ViroSeq HIV-1 Genotyping System (Celera Diagnostics, Alameda, California)."

question: From which countries were the sequenced samples obtained?
answer: Brazil, Haiti, India, Malawi, Peru, South Africa, Thailand, the United States, and Zimbabwe
explain: The paper lists the countries where the clinical trial was conducted, indicating that the sequenced samples were obtained from these countries.
sentences: "PEARLS (ClinicalTrials.gov NCT00084136) was a multinational, phase 4, randomized, open-label clinical trial, conducted in Brazil, Haiti, India, Malawi, Peru, South Africa, Thailand, the United States, and Zimbabwe."

question: From what years were the sequenced samples obtained?
explain: The paper mentions that the participants were enrolled and samples were collected during the years 2005 to 2007.
sentences: "During 2005--2007, 1571 eligible participants were enrolled and randomly assigned to 1 of 3 treatment arms."; "PEARLS baseline samples were collected between 2005 and 2007, relatively early in the roll-out of ART, which might have affected the prevalence of pretreatment drug resistance."

question: What method was used for sequencing?
explain: The paper mentions the use of the ViroSeq HIV-1 Genotyping System, which is based on Sanger sequencing.
sentences: "Pol genotyping was performed retrospectively at 4 regional laboratories that participated in the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID) Division of AIDS Virology Quality Assurance program using the ViroSeq HIV-1 Genotyping System (Celera Diagnostics, Alameda, California)."

question: Were samples cloned prior to sequencing?
explain: The paper does not mention any cloning of samples prior to sequencing.

question: Did samples undergo single genome sequencing?
explain: The paper does not mention the use of single genome sequencing; it only mentions population sequencing.
sentences: "Genotyping was also performed using population sequencing, which may not detect low-level HIV variants with drug resistance mutations."

question: What clinical specimens were sequenced?
explain: The paper mentions that plasma samples were stored and used for genotyping.

explain: The paper includes participants who experienced virologic failure and had their samples genotyped.
sentences: "Genotyping was successful for 261 of 270 (97%) participants in the subcohort group (51 failed ART) and for 205 of 218 (94%) additional participants in the case group (all failed ART)."

question: Were any sequences obtained from the proviral DNA reservoir?
explain: The paper does not mention obtaining sequences from the proviral DNA reservoir; it only mentions plasma samples.

question: Were the patients in the study in a clinical trial?
explain: The paper describes the study as a multinational, randomized clinical trial.
sentences: "We examined the association of pretreatment (baseline) drug resistance and subtype with virologic failure in a multinational, randomized clinical trial that evaluated 3 antiretroviral treatment (ART) regimens and included resource-limited setting sites."

question: How many individuals had samples obtained for HIV sequencing?
explain: The paper mentions that genotyping was performed on samples from 488 participants.
sentences: "Of 1571 participants, 488 (31%) were included in the full case cohort (Figure ​ (Figure1). 1 ). Genotyping was successful for 261 of 270 (97%) participants in the subcohort group (51 failed ART) and for 205 of 218 (94%) additional participants in the case group (all failed ART)."

question: Does the paper report HIV sequences from individuals who had previously received ARV drugs?
explain: The paper mentions that some participants had received antiretroviral drugs for prevention of mother-to-child transmission (PMTCT) before enrollment.
sentences: "The following participants received antiretroviral drugs for prevention of mother-to-child transmission (PMTCT) of HIV prior to enrollment: ID 15, received single-dose nevirapine (sdNVP) 16 weeks before enrollment; ID 20, received sdNVP 11 weeks before enrollment; ID 28, received ZDV monotherapy 65--70 weeks before enrollment; ID 29, received sdNVP 29 weeks before enrollment."

question: Which drug classes were received by individuals in the study before sample sequencing?
explain: The paper mentions that participants had mutations associated with nucleoside reverse transcriptase inhibitors (NRTIs), nonnucleoside reverse transcriptase inhibitors (NNRTIs), and protease inhibitors (PIs).
sentences: "In the subcohort group, at least 1 resistance mutation was identified in 11 of 261 (4.2%) participants (95% [CI], 2.1%--7.4%) (IDs 1--11, Table ​Table2); 7 had nucleoside reverse transcriptase inhibitor (NRTI) mutations, 2 had nonnucleoside reverse transcriptase inhibitor (NNRTI) mutations, and 2 had protease inhibitor (PI) mutations."

question: Which drugs were received by individuals in the study before sample sequencing?
explain: The paper mentions that some participants received single-dose nevirapine (NVP) or zidovudine (ZDV) for prevention of mother-to-child transmission (PMTCT) before enrollment.
sentences: "The following participants received antiretroviral drugs for prevention of mother-to-child transmission (PMTCT) of HIV prior to enrollment: ID 15, received single-dose nevirapine (sdNVP) 16 weeks before enrollment; ID 20, received sdNVP 11 weeks before enrollment; ID 28, received ZDV monotherapy 65--70 weeks before enrollment; ID 29, received sdNVP 29 weeks before enrollment."
